ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads of the publication */,
  "visitors" INTEGER /* Number of visitors who viewed the publication */,
  "countries" INTEGER /* Number of countries where the publication was accessed */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication was published */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue of the journal */,
  "page_range" TEXT /* Page range of the publication in the journal */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the publication is open access */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the publication is published */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doi")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" INTEGER /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_affiliation FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a publication and an author */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication (e.g., 1 for first author) */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the author to the publication */,
  "corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the author is the corresponding author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_doi FOREIGN KEY ("doi") REFERENCES publications ("doi")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the downloaded publication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the publication */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was downloaded */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user who downloaded the publication */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who downloaded the publication */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) of the user who downloaded the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_downloads_doi FOREIGN KEY ("doi") REFERENCES publications ("doi"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit event */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the visited publication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who visited the publication */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was visited */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user who visited the publication */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who visited the publication */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) of the user who visited the publication */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_visits_doi FOREIGN KEY ("doi") REFERENCES publications ("doi")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, student, librarian) */,
  "affiliation" INTEGER /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's record was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_affiliation FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_countries" (
  "publication_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a publication and a country */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication was accessed from the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_countries_doi FOREIGN KEY ("doi") REFERENCES publications ("doi"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_countries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliation */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the affiliation */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the affiliation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the affiliation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the affiliation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a publication and a keyword */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword related to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_keywords_doi FOREIGN KEY ("doi") REFERENCES publications ("doi")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a publication and a category */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_categories_doi FOREIGN KEY ("doi") REFERENCES publications ("doi")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the impact data of a publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "mentions" INTEGER /* Number of mentions the publication has received */,
  "altmetric_score" REAL /* Altmetric score of the publication */,
  "social_media_shares" INTEGER /* Number of social media shares of the publication */,
  "news_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of news mentions of the publication */,
  "blog_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of blog mentions of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_impact_doi FOREIGN KEY ("doi") REFERENCES publications ("doi")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the publication */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was published */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_doi FOREIGN KEY ("doi") REFERENCES publications ("doi")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication citing the reference */,
  "reference_doi" TEXT /* DOI of the reference */,
  "reference_title" TEXT /* Title of the reference */,
  "reference_year" INTEGER /* Year of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_references_doi FOREIGN KEY ("doi") REFERENCES publications ("doi")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_doi FOREIGN KEY ("doi") REFERENCES publications ("doi")
)
